languages.text: {n}Арджента исступленно шепчет литанию, сложив аквилу на груди.{/n} "Праведный разум не сломить происками Его врагов".

traits.locale_text: {n}Арджента исступленно шепчет литанию, сложив аквилу на груди.{/n} "Праведный разум не сломить происками Его врагов".
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

languages.text: {n}Argenta hurriedly whispers a litany, forming the Aquila over her chest.{/n} "The righteous mind cannot be broken by the machinations of His enemies."

languages.text: {n}Argenta susurra apresuradamente una letanía y hace el signo del Aquila sobre su pecho.{/n} «Una mente justa no se doblega ante las maquinaciones de Sus enemigos».
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta hurriedly whispers a litany, forming the Aquila over her chest.{/n} "The righteous mind cannot be broken by the machinations of His enemies."

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta susurra apresuradamente una letanía y hace el signo del Aquila sobre su pecho.{/n} «Una mente justa no se doblega ante las maquinaciones de Sus enemigos».

languages.text: {n}阿洁塔匆匆低诵一篇祷词，在胸前做出双头鹰手势。{/n}“正义之心，绝不会被祂仇敌的诡计所击垮。”
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta hurriedly whispers a litany, forming the Aquila over her chest.{/n} "The righteous mind cannot be broken by the machinations of His enemies."

traits.locale_text: {n}阿洁塔匆匆低诵一篇祷词，在胸前做出双头鹰手势。{/n}“正义之心，绝不会被祂仇敌的诡计所击垮。”

languages.text: {n}Argenta murmure une litanie empressée en traçant le signe de l'Aquila sur sa poitrine.{/n} « Un esprit vertueux est imperméable aux machinations de Ses ennemis. »
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta hurriedly whispers a litany, forming the Aquila over her chest.{/n} "The righteous mind cannot be broken by the machinations of His enemies."

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta murmure une litanie empressée en traçant le signe de l'Aquila sur sa poitrine.{/n} « Un esprit vertueux est imperméable aux machinations de Ses ennemis. »

languages.text: {n}Argenta, göğsünde Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yaparak aceleyle bir ilahi fısıldıyor.{/n} "Doğru zihin, O'nun düşmanlarının entrikalarıyla kırılamaz."
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta hurriedly whispers a litany, forming the Aquila over her chest.{/n} "The righteous mind cannot be broken by the machinations of His enemies."

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta, göğsünde Çift Başlı Kartal işareti yaparak aceleyle bir ilahi fısıldıyor.{/n} "Doğru zihin, O'nun düşmanlarının entrikalarıyla kırılamaz."

languages.text: {n}Argenta flüstert eilig eine Litanei und formt über ihrer Brust den Adler.{/n} "Der rechtschaffene Verstand kann von den Machenschaften Seiner Feinde nicht gebrochen werden."
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta hurriedly whispers a litany, forming the Aquila over her chest.{/n} "The righteous mind cannot be broken by the machinations of His enemies."

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta flüstert eilig eine Litanei und formt über ihrer Brust den Adler.{/n} Der rechtschaffene Verstand kann von den Machenschaften Seiner Feinde nicht gebrochen werden."

languages.text: {n}アルジェンタは慌てて祈りをささげ、胸に鷲の紋章を形成する。{/n}「正義の心は、敵の策略によって打ち砕かれることはない」
